query.query_string: Peginterferon alfa-2a AND heart valve disease

data.query: Peginterferon alfa-2a AND heart valve disease

results.title: Safety and efficacy of peginterferon alpha plus ribavirin in patients with chronic hepatitis C and coexisting heart disease.
results.abstract: Chronic hepatitis C patients with coexisting heart disease are often denied antiviral treatment due to safety concerns. However, this is not evidence-based.
results.journal: Digestive and liver disease : official journal of the Italian Society of Gastroenterology and the Italian Association for the Study of the Liver

results.title: [Apical hypertrophic cardiomyopathy associated with HCV infection].
results.abstract: A case is reported of a female patient with apical hypertrophic cardiomyopathy with negative chest T waves associated with HCV infection.
